name: Bennigan's Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and sauté them in butter and oil until they are transparent but not well browned.
2. When the onions are tender, reduce heat to the lowest setting and sprinkle with flour, stirring vigorously.
3. Pour the mixture into a Dutch oven and stir in the broths.
4. Heat thoroughly and divide among 8 oven-proof bowls.
5. Place a slice of bread on top of each serving.
6. Mix equal parts of cheese with the smooth paste and spread over the bread.
7. Place all bowls on the oven rack, about 4 inches from the broiler heat and broil until the cheese melts.
8. Serve immediately. Leftover soup freezes well for up to 6 months.
